title: Add What If? Scenario Explorer to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: What if...?
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the greenhouse! The 'What If? Scenario Explorer' lets you dive into interactive speculative storytelling and navigate branching narratives.
gist.summary: Added the 'What If? Scenario Explorer' to the community apps showcase under the writing category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new interactive tool for speculative storytelling and narrative exploration.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a 'What If? Scenario Explorer' for writing and storytelling. Metaphors: branching paths, storybooks, crystal balls, question marks, exploring alternate realities. Characters: Polly the bee looking into a glowing crystal ball or reading a magical branching storybook.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses, looking into a glowing crystal ball that shows branching paths. A retro computer monitor in the background displays a magical storybook. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses, looking into a glowing crystal ball that shows branching paths. A retro computer monitor in the background displays a magical storybook. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
